title: Filter and Search Workspaces in Sidebar

findings.summary: Project search works - filters projects by name
findings.description: The 'Search projects...' textbox correctly filters project cards in the grid view by name. Matching projects appear; non-matching are hidden.

findings.summary: Total count does not update when search filters results
findings.description: The '1 total' counter next to 'Projects' heading remains static even when search hides all projects.

findings.summary: Status/Tech Stack filters lack dropdown or clear feedback
findings.description: The Status and Tech Stack filter buttons appear to toggle filter states but do not show a dropdown or popover with filter options. No visual indication of active filter state.

findings.summary: Sidebar workspace tree does not filter with main search
findings.description: The PROJECTS section in the sidebar always shows all projects/workspaces regardless of the search query in the main grid.
